headline: Bernstein: Human oversight remains critical despite rapid AI coding integration
summary: Investing.com -- Generative AI is not yet driving systematic job losses in the technology sector, according to a report from Bernstein, despite the rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into professional coding workflows. Following 50 hours of intensive interviews with tech professionals globally, analysts found that AI is reshaping role boundaries, but human capital remains "surprisingly resilient," debunking popular narratives of an immediate white-collar "apocalypse."
